alkylation reagent: N-ethylmaleimide (NEM; E3876, 20 mM) were purchased from Sigma-Aldrich.
alkylation concentration: N-ethylmaleimide (NEM; E3876, 20 mM) were purchased from Sigma-Aldrich.
cleavage agent: the E93R substitution allows SUMO1 to be cleaved by trypsin to generate a QTGG-tag
collision energy: HCD-MS/MS: resolution=15,000; isolation window=1.6; AGC target=1e5; maximum injection time=100 ms; collision energy=30.
fragmentation method: HCD-MS/MS: resolution=15,000; isolation window=1.6; AGC target=1e5; maximum injection time=100 ms; collision energy=30.
instrument: analyzed by online nanospray LC-MS/MS on a Q Exactive HF (Thermo Fisher Scientific)
ionization type: The electrospray voltage of 2 kV versus the inlet of the mass spectrometer was used.
